caption:
If you’re tired of the loud party brunches and just want a peaceful Saturday with the family, this is your sign to visit Brunch & Bask at Serein.

The Details:
- Unlimited buffet with soft beverages
- Complimentary pool access
- Stunning Dubai Creek & Burj Khalifa view

🗓️ Every Saturday | 12 PM – 4 PM | AED 150
📍 Hilton Dubai Creek Hotel & Residences 
@hiltondubaicreekhotel
